title: cur8
description: Simple, stylised, animated cursors for the Cursors Extended mod
body:
![Some of the cursors in the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a5353c61888104689b3a0e4689c5bbfeab3cbab.png)
---
**cur8** is a [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor) resource pack that provides simple, stylised cursor icons to your game. Most icons in the pack are animated, providing a more immersive experience when navigating the menus.
